QANTO | SDK

THE CODEX ZERO-LAWS DITA PROOFS x402 SETTLEMENT OMNICHAIN BRIDGE

The Natural Law Codex

Welcome to the Sovereign Registry of Universal Truth. QANTO is not just a protocol; it is a mathematical foundation for the next stage of civilization.

00 // THE ZERO-LAWS

The mesh is governed by three absolute constraints that cannot be modified by any entity, including the Architect:

I. Code is Immutable Reality.
II. Intent is the Only Asset.
III. Finality is Synchronous & Universal.

01 // DITA PROOFS

Direct Intent Telemetry Attestation (DITA) ensures that transactions are not just signatures, but verified synaptic snapshots of absolute intent.

struct IntentProof {
  nullifier: bytes32,
  synaptic_root: bytes32,
  zk_stark: Proof
}

02 // x402 SETTLEMENT

The x402 layer acts as the physical-to-digital gateway, reconciling legacy financial intake with the sovereign liquid-metal mesh.

Use the HyperBridge to wrap and export veracity credits globally.
